reviews.comments: Great place to stay for Yosemite! Clean and perfect for 2 people.

10/10! Avand is a great host, responsive and helpful. The location is beautiful, private & peaceful, surrounded by big trees & I loved listening to the birds chirping in the morning. The barn is spacious, clean, tidy & homey. The furnitures are cozy & everything you need is there. We had a wonderful stay & would stay again!
Perfect little barn to stay at for your Yosemite adventures!
Avand, was a great host, very attentive, fast responds, gave clear instruction. I would definitely stay here again it felt like home.
Really sweet and clean place, highly recommend for anyone that is looking for a place to relax and immerse themselves in nature.
It was very nice and isolated, which is what we wanted. Very clean and comfortable, it felt just like home.

We had such a great time at the barn! The decorations and atmosphere were so cozy and it was a perfect winter getaway. We appreciated having the two bathrooms and plenty of extra towels. Avand was easy to get a hold of and we loved exploring Mariposa close by. Highly recommended!

Our stay at the Giddy Up to Yosemite was great! The location was great. Perfectly placed to be outside of town but still close to Woodland and Bootjack. And it was roughly the same distance between Mariposa and Oakhurst. Making it a great choice for those that love a small town feel, but still in a reasonable distance from more creature comforts. And also the ability to take HWY 41 or HWY 140 into Yosemite.
It is a quiet property, which was great to have a place to call home during the hustle and bustle of the holiday season. The stocked kitchen was phenomenal! I was able to help cook for holiday celebrations easily.
And having two full bathrooms was wonderful. They even had bidets!
The bed was a little on the small end, so for two people it was a little cramped.
But overall it was a wonderful stay. We throughly enjoyed our time and would recommend staying here.
Avand was an attentive and wonderful host. Provided information in timely manner and had all the bases covered.
Highly recommend! 1 hour to Yosemite with a beautiful drive.

This property is perfect if you want to visit Yosemite. It's about 1 hour 15 from Yosemite Village and the drive is just beautiful with so many stunning views along the way.
The property was easy to find and Avand was really good with communication in getting access to the properly.
It has everything you need for a trip away, I felt right at home.
If I visit Yosemite again which there is no doubt I won't, I will defo be staying in this property again!

Amazing stay!
We love how peaceful and beautiful the surrounds were! Would stay again!
Avand was a great host! Cannot recommend this property enough — was perfect for a Yosemite trip
This was a perfect cozy little barn for my boyfriend and I. Having two bathrooms was a huge plus as most smaller cabins/barns only have one. Overall a great space, very beautiful.
The barn was a great place to rest after our days adventures in Yosemite. Clean, quiet, comfortable.  Thank you!
10/10 great place! Would stay here again
Absolutely loved our stay, would stay again and am recommending it to some friends!

cozy little barn in a very remote area. great as a rest place after long days at yosemite. he had a lovely guest book and one with recommendations / instructions that we definitely used. great stay! lots of wildlife around too

Our stay was okay. Definitely did not like the response from the parking as there was no clear information about it. Had asked a simple question and the response was rude. Cleanliness and privacy was not the best either as there was still leftover trash, no sponge to wash dishes, a door does not have a blind in the living room for privacy, and there were spider and webs in the restroom. The bedroom does not have a TV which was unfortunate.
We did really enjoy how close it was to Yosemite and the barn was gorgeous. Recommend using YARTS very early in the AM to arrive early to Yosemite to avoid driving in Yosemite. Recommend staying in Oakhurst as there are more things to do there and plenty of supermarkets. We did love Sierra Cider that was minutes away from the Airbnb! The service was way better than what I received from the hosts.
Great stay, nothing to say
Wonderful location and set up.  The positives are the kitchen had everything we needed.  The upstairs bedroom and bathroom were very comfortable.  Overall we were very happy with this home.

Loved our stay at Barn 3388A (blue). Quiet, cozy, and felt like home. Clean space, fully stocked kitchen, and two bathrooms made it super comfortable. Hosts were very responsive. A peaceful base for Yosemite, even if nights can feel a bit spooky for city folks. Would happily stay again.
Had a great time! Wifi went out and that was a little disappointing but the house and care more than made up for it :) Do try the cider brewery nearby.

comments.comments: Amazing experience near Yosemite! It was perfect 😍

reviews.comments: We highly recommend this home.  It's full of thoughtful details and amenities. The host was terrific with communication. The area is beautiful and not too far from Mariposa and Yosemite.
This barn was a wonderful place to rest for the duration of our trip to Yosemite. Would definitely recommend!

I had a wonderful stay at this barn in Mariposa! Avand was incredibly kind and responsive, making everything smooth and easy. The place is very quiet and peaceful, perfect for a relaxing getaway. I would definitely recommend this stay to anyone visiting the area!
Great place to stay!

A cozy landing point between Mariposa and Yosemite for our adventures, a well-equipped kitchen for nightly cooking, really cool shower and bidet options in both bathrooms, really comfortable bed/pillows (but would note that the futon was uncomfortable for an adult), and a quiet and lovely neighborhood to be in (easy to navigate;  even next to secondary rental, it felt private and we were able to use the hot tub when we wanted). Avand was easy to get a hold of when needed (we had a minor issue we needed assistance with and Avand and his crew handled it immediately and with great care).
Good and peaceful stay after Yosemite
Loved staying here after a long couple of days hiking in Yosemite. The hot tub was great and the kitchen had all the facilities we needed to make our dinners and packed lunches for the next day!
A nice, cozy stay for our trip to Yosemite. Looked exactly as pictured and offered a clean and comfortable place to relax.

Recently stayed for a trip to Yosemite.  The place was pretty much as described and overall I was pleased with my stay.  Kitchen was well stocked.  The AC was off upstairs and it was HOT.  Nice and quiet area too.
The perfect spot to hangout after Yosemite adventures. Would come back!

The accommodation was really great. We were concerned that we may have been too far away from Yosemite initially, but the drive from here in Mariposa was very easy and there were hardly any other cars around. The place itself is stunning, has a lovely alpine feel to it and provides all of the amenities anyone would require. The hosts provided all the necessary information well in advance of our arrival but equally left us to ourselves the whole time which was really appreciated. Would definitely recommend to others.
This place was phenomenal! We truly enjoyed our brief but wonderful time there before we went to Yosemite.
Great place in a wonderful location, highly recommend!
Great place in the middle of a peaceful area! Perfect spot for visiting Yosemite National Park!

We stayed here for two nights to visit Yosemite and our experience was smooth from start to finish. I appreciated the thorough instructions, fully equipped kitchen so we could make ourselves breakfast, and how modern and clean everything was. Keypad entry and wifi were a breeze. The proximity to Yosemite made it easy to beat the crowds and grab dinner from Mariposa. As a bonus, we woke up our first morning to find three deer grazing just outside the window - it was so magical!
Do try to arrive before nightfall, especially if you're not a confident driver, as the roads are dark and winding - this is in the instructions, but we got caught in traffic from an accident.

We loved our stay at the barn! It’s a short drive into town for restaurants or coffee in the morning. We used it as a touchdown space while exploring Yosemite. Perfect size for a couples getaway. Wish we had more time to utilize the hot tub and outdoor space.
This is a cozy little barn to spend a weekend. Yosemite valley is about an hour drive from this place. Beautiful surrounding, peaceful and quiet.
Hands down one of the best airbnbs I’ve ever stayed at. Highly recommend staying here if you’re looking for a relaxing and quick drive to the yoesemite.

We loved our stay! About 1 hour 20 mins from Yosemite Village and was perfect for what we needed. Perfectly clean, really comfy bed. Everything there for you to be able to cook. There is a big booklet with any information you may need about the property and Yosemite with recommendations of trails and places to eat. Host was really quick to respond too. All in all really good stay.

We had a delightful stay. It was a perfect location for our Yosemite adventures, and it was wonderful to come home each day. The cottage is cozy, thoughtfully appointed and very serene. We appreciated using the hot tub after long hikes, and the bed was SO comfortable! Avand was extremely responsive and helpful when we were trying to figure out all of the details for getting to the park. We can't wait to come back!
Had an excellent time at the cabin, would recommend to anyone visiting Yosemite!
I wanto to come back longer
Wonderful location and fantastic space. We loved staying here! Host was fantastic as well.
Incredibly well prepared and thoughtful retreat, we had a wonderful stay and HIGHLY recommend this property
Very cozy and comfortable stay. Everything is just as described and very clean. We enjoyed our stay.
We loved our stay. Avand was a wonderful host. He was very attentive throughout our stay.

We had an amazing stay at this beautiful barn in Mariposa! The space was clean, cozy, and well designed. If you’re looking for a unique and serene getaway, this is the perfect spot. We can’t wait to come back!
An amazing place in beautiful surroundings. Close to Yosemite and downtown Mariposa. The barn was exactly as described and so cozy. We thoroughly enjoyed the hot tub and had a cozy relaxing weekend!

If you're looking for the perfect spot to your Yosemite adventures, look no further than Avand's cabin! We couldn't have asked for a better setting and a more well-stocked spot to rest and relax after hiking all day. Avand was communicative and responsive as a host. The cabin has pretty much everything you could think you'd need, is very comfortable, and the hot tub was just the cherry on top!

The barn was nice and andy wrote every introduction perfectly well. The decoration was cute and the kitchen fully equipped. Everything was clean and the booklet has plenty of recommendations! Thanks a lot!

Aavand’s place was beautiful and well-maintained. A little heads-up: There are no grocery stores or restaurants nearby. By nearby, I mean you drive at least 18-20 minutes, so grab food or groceries before you head to the Airbnb if you are driving in the evening. Keep an eye out for which route you take if driving after sunset; one of the roads is not well maintained, so when you drive up the hills at most, vigilance is needed, but otherwise, a beautiful stay at the foothills of Yosemite.

We had a great time at Avand's barn! Everything was exactly as described, the place was clean and very cozy. Made us feel right at home! Our only "complaint" is that we had only two nights there and basically only used the place to sleep between our visits to Yosemite. Otherwise we'd have definitely taken advantage of the whirlpool, spent more time watching the deer in the backyard and enjoying the beautiful surroundings! Next time we'll stay longer!

We loved our stay at Avand’s place! It was nice, clean, and modern. We loved all the little touches inside and there were detailed instructions and information from check in to check out. It was perfect for our weekend stay visiting Yosemite. Highly recommend!

comments.comments: Very nice location in the foothills of the Yosemite (1 hour drive to access it). The place is tastefully decorated - and a very nice “tech” little side.  The first grocery store is 10 miles away - anticipate! Avand spends a lodge with questions, knows the area very well and has good addresses! A great spot!

reviews.comments: This was a great place to stay outside of Yosemite and make day trips to the park. We really enjoyed our time here!
We stayed here while visiting Yosemite. Everything was comfortable and enjoyable, only 15 minutes from town with good restaurants and things to do

The place was really amazing. Loved every little detail of it. You dont need to bring anything other than your personal items. Everthing was there. The location was also good but bif far from Yosemite national park. Its bit scary at night to drive to the place

Had a blast at the Barn! Super cozy and private (probably because the Cabin next door wasn’t booked at the time but still great). Avand has everything laid out so you have a great stay. Responsive and accommodating. The only thing I wish there was more of… was time. Hope to be back soon.

My mom and I stayed here while visiting Yosemite. We LOVED the property! It was so quirky and we loved every aspect. A wildfire broke out in the days leading up to our stay and—since we were flying across the country for this trip—we were (of course) nervous. Avand was super assuring about what would happen and kept us in the loop. We decided to visit in the busy season of Yosemite, so the *wait times* into the park have nothing to do with the *drive time* into the park. We used both the South Entrance and Arch Rock Entrances and our drive time to both entrances was roughly an hour. We went through Oakhurst to the South Entrance and down back roads for the Arch Rock Entrance. Overall, we loved the property and its amenities. When (not if!) we return to Yosemite, I look forward to returning to Kaleidoscope Hill as well 😊
Avand’s place is a great place to stay for a trip to Yosemite! It is about one hour from the park entrance. The place is in a peaceful area and is exactly as listed.

Amazing place to stay somewhat close to Yosemite. The barn is absolutely beautiful, and the location too. The hosts are also fantastic. There is a hot tub too. Great air conditioning, full kitchen, and 2 bathrooms. While we were staying there, there was a power outage and Avand was very helpful in getting a generator setup until power was restored. I highly recommend this place.

Had a Great stay! Area was peaceful and the little house itself was very nice! It’s about 40 minutes from the nearest entrance to Yosemite. Price is a little high but if you plan on doing more than just staying inside the entire time, it’s well worth the trip. The only thing I can really complain about is the surrounding brush and landscape was completely dead, but I also chose to go in the summer so that should speak for itself 😅

A good stay if going to Yosemite. The area was quiet and peaceful. Do follow avands suggestion and arrive while it’s light out, at least for the first night. The place was nice and has all the amenities you would need to relax after a long day.
Great cozy home to come to after a long day at Yosemite. We enjoyed it very much. Good vibes all round :)
Beautiful palace to stay! Highly recommend if you are looking for a place in the area :)

comments.comments: we had a very nice stay!!

reviews.comments: A wonderful place for two. Very easy to find and very peaceful for a trip to Yosemite. We did a lot of meal prep and cooking here and it was easy and effortless. The two bathrooms is an added bonus.
Lovely place, well equiped and very new.
Nice place, well stocked, clean. Messaging with and from the host was clear and timely. Would recommend!
This barn is a perfect oasis — It’s beautiful and clean and welcoming! Communication was clear, and recommendations were helpful. Felt right at home!

Nicest barn you'll ever stay in. The build quality & attention to details gives this place good vibes & energy.
It seems to me, for this price range, I lot of Airbnb owners slap something together and/or do half ass fixes just to make some money. You feel the difference when you stay at Avand's barn.

We loved our stay at the barn house! Avand was a great host and everything was exactly as pictured. The wifi had gone out on our first night for a few hours and Avand was very responsive and gave us timely updates. It was only for a few hours so we just took that time to explore the town and had dinner at the local restaurant. The views from the second floor were also incredible in the early mornings and late nights. We will definitely stay with him again when we come back to visit Yosemite! ⛰️⛰️
What an amazing place! Super modern, balcony was amazing, so peaceful and in a great location if you are visiting Yosemite. Compared to their hotel prices this is a steal! Very impressed

Had a fantastic stay here during my Yosemite trip. Loved how peaceful and private the barn was. The AC was strong (very important during a heat wave) and the heated bidets were a nice touch! Also loved that all the water came from the well and the fridge had its own cold water filter. Can’t wait to stay here again
Great cozy spot for those looking for a weekend getaway away right outside of Yosemite

One of the best Airbnb’s we have stayed at!! A lovely peaceful cabin with a hot tub which we didn’t realise was included until we got there! The bed was so comfortable with the softest linen. Great bathrooms and kitchen had everything we needed. It was a 1hr drive to Yosemite and Avand was very responsive and helpful with a great book of recommendations and notes. We will definitely be back and recommend to others !
The space is extremely clean, well-decorated, and stocked with essentials. It was such a relaxing stay post-Yosemite, and I hope to return in the future.
Loved this little cabin and all the cool art and music posters around the place. It’s a very peaceful area and you get a little balcony area too. Would definitely stay here again.

Being 20min. away from Mariposa town it was pretty perfect for us to stay out of Yosemite park. Instead we used the bus system (left our rental at the park and ride stop) to get to and into the park avoiding the hassle of getting a day pass required for private vehicles (which we couldn't get anyways, and plus if you come in the bus you skip the line and get to rest on the way to the park).
Regarding the stay, we pretty much loved it. Most things were great, and not enough time to enjoy so many cool features of the place. My only recommendation is to have a small table lamp or floor lamp for the kitchen/dining area to avoid using the ceiling light. I personally like the very dim stove light under microwave but it was broken.
Having coffee and the supplies to grind and prep saved our morning and made it so perfect. The place has a growing collection of wine bottle openers, I counted 4, so that was funny.
The decor was very neat and we only regret not getting a 2nd night. Awesome! ty!

This place was such an amazing and comfortable stay - definitely one of my favorite Airbnb’s that I have ever stayed at. It was very clean and well put together. The inside is so nicely decorated and it felt good to relax here after a day in Yosemite. I will definitely recommend this place to anyone I know who plans on going to Yosemite :-)

comments.comments: Great place to stay - just wonderful to relax the tired legs in the hot tub after a day of hiking at Yosemite NP:)!  We would book again.

reviews.comments: Super comfortable barn close to Yosemite NP. Really like it
The stay was peaceful with beautiful surroundings.
Quaint cabin with all the modern amenities! Location is about an hour to Tunnel View and easy to find on a paved road with neighbor houses in sight. We enjoyed our stay!

Stayed for 2 Nights with my fiancé as a little getaway … was totally worth it !!!
Everything was excellent, Yosemite was about an hour drive from there.
Overall had a great experience

Very cute and cozy little barn for a peaceful get away. Conveniently located near Yosemite Nation Park. The host was very responsive and helpful with local suggestions, definitely recommend to my friends and family.
Awesome place!

My husband and I stayed here with our two dogs over Christmas. This very cozy little cabin could not have been a more perfect getaway; honestly one of the best Airbnb experiences we’ve ever had. The kitchen was extremely well appointed (we cooked all our meals), the internet speed was very fast and easy to access, and Avand is a perfect host. Friendly, responsive, proactive communication and kind person. We would love to come back!
Had a great stay, loved the cabin and everything was as advertised!
Great place to stay if you're visiting Yosemite! The barn was amazing! Felt right at home.

We very much enjoyed our stay at Avand and Connie’s space after a trip to Yosemite Valley. The space was clean, warm, and incredibly cozy and the provided amenities were very much appreciated.
It was also very nice waking up in the morning to the birds and deer outside. We’ll definitely be looking to come back soon!
Great stay. Avand was very accommodating with the check in and check out. Place was as described and clean. I would stay here again.

We loved having coffee on the deck while watching and listening to the birds. The space is cozy, comfortable, and private despite having neighbors nearby. Wish we could have stayed longer. Appreciated the fun art and cloud-like pillows.

Me, my wife, and two pets had a great month-long stay in the "barn". The renovations done to make this a living space were really impressive and made us feel at home. In terms of the location, we loved being in the countryside where deer visited daily along with other wildlife. We were close to another cabin being rented but never had any problems and felt as though we had our privacy. We were a 20 minute drive from town, roughly an hour from Yosemite, and a few hours from Sequoia/Kings Canyon - which worked really well for what we were seeking to do with our time here. Avand and Connie were a great team to make us feel cared for and making sure we had everything we needed. Highly recommended for those seeking a short or longer-term place to stay in the Sierra foothills.
The place was great, it was clean. I loved all the house plants, however it would have been nice if they had some coffee. The coffee machine was there.
Quiet, spotless location. Built-in ice maker is a huge plus. The WiFi is strong and there are plenty of outlets. There are multiple seating areas. Good communication from host.
Exactly what we needed for a weekend trip to Yosemite! Very clean and clear instructions

The view of the stars alone is worth the stay. Not to mention the deer in the morning, the comfort and welcoming note left for us! AC and air purifier were on before we even entered the door. Everything was perfect. The vibe felt like the host knew us personally it was so strange yet perfect at the same time. Will definitely be returning! There was plenty of space for my husband, our 7 month old son and myself.  Thank you again!

Great place to stay if you’re visiting Yosemite! From the 41 I believe the entrance is about a 40 minute drive, and same for the entrance from the 49. Really enjoyed this place! The two bathrooms were such a selling point! Very clean and easy to find!
Very clean and cute space! I would definitely stay here again if ever in the area. Thanks!

comments.comments: One of the most beautiful airbnbs we have had so far. The small cottage with two bathrooms on the ground floor and on the converted attic offers many opportunities and space to recover after a day at Yosemite NP. Also the small terrace on the upper floor is great. In the kitchen everything is there to be able to cook, best to shop in the Pioneer Market in Mariposa beforehand, there is the best and largest offer in the area.

reviews.comments: The barn is very confortable, quiet and like a "little cocoon". It is a good place to breathe a bit, even though you need to take your car to go hiking/visit trails as most of the paths around are for private property. Beautiful place with the chance to meet familiy of deers. The only "complaint" is for the checkout which was at 10am, and since we are night owls, It was complicated to wake up but it's understandable.
Great space and wildlife in the area! The barn was converted beautifully and is not too far from the Main and South Yosemite NP gets. It’s quick ride into town too.
Beautiful and peaceful space. Loved our stay here while we explored Yosemite national park. Would book again if we come back :)
We had a wonderful time at this lovely barn. Good place to stay for a visit to Yosemite.

We had a great time at Avand’s place, it was just as described, the kitchen is well equipped and there is plenty of room for a couple. We stayed here and drove 1:30 hours to Yosemite for a hike and Mariposa town is 15 minute drive away with some great places for takeaway pizza. Thanks for hosting us!
You’re missing out if you don’t stay here!

comments.comments: This great place is just fantastic. We totally enjoyed our days there and can really recommend it.

reviews.comments: Great spot if your visiting Yosemite but do not want to stay somewhere immediately outside the park.
Felt like a brand new apartment with brand new amenities. About an hour to Yosemite national park and about an hour and half back to airbnb.

This place is absolutely adorable. Super clean, cute amenities. Only issue we had was that the bed and futon weren’t the most comfortable. Had we been staying longer I think my back would have paid the price.
If you’re going to Yosemite from here be mindful it’s a 80 min drive one way. In the morning that didn’t bother me but coming home after hiking wasn’t the greatest.
Overall , super cute place just needs some nicer sleeping and sitting furniture.
Thank you for having us! Great place we really enjoyed it. We had a special visit from a family of deers!

A great place to stay for visiting Yosemite! The space itself is very comfortable and everything felt very clean. We did a big hike in Yosemite and it was nice to come back here and cook a nice dinner afterwards. Would definitely recommend!
I travel a lot and this was by far one of the best cabins for the price.
Good location for Yosemite trips (only an hours drive). Easy to find and had great kitchen facilities.

Beautifully located, beautifully appointed, elegantly equipped. The kitchen is equipped with great utensils, excellent knives, fully supplied with spices. Towels were fluffy, showers had wonderful pressure. Truly felt like a luxury rental, extremely close to two different entrances for Yosemite National Park.
Avand’s place was beautiful & peaceful! Perfect for a visit to Yosemite and not far from Mariposa. The home was unique in style and gave out a warm & cozy feeling. I would love to return one day!

Avand’s place was very peaceful. The whole aesthetic of the place made you feel right at home. Everything you could need in terms of utensils, Tupperware, body wash, etc  was at this place which I really enjoyed, you don’t find that at much airbnbs in my experience. The hosts were also very friendly and always made sure our stay was enjoyable. I would definitely go back again!
Amazing air bnb! Has everything you need, and a great location to visit Yosemite. Felt safe, it was super clean, and host was very responsive. Overall and amazing stay, and would highly recommend!
Great spot can’t wait to come back!
